parsed.production_notes: The video uses a mixed production approach. The human character is live-action recorded, while the robot character is clearly AI-generated, evidenced by its perfectly symmetrical, uncanny face, stiff micro-expressions, and unnatural lip-syncing.

characters.appearance: Female-presenting humanoid robot. Features a glossy white synthetic casing with visible mechanical joints at the neck and shoulders. She has a perfectly symmetrical face with striking blue eyes and subtle, makeup-like contours.
characters.wardrobe: White robotic casing/armor, no traditional clothing.
characters.demeanor: Calm, polite, slightly stiff and uncanny.

characters.appearance: Young adult human male with a slim build and medium brown complexion. He has short, dark, slightly wavy hair and a clean-shaven face.
characters.demeanor: Casual, slightly hesitant but eager to learn.

scenes.setting: Video call interface, plain grey background for AI, softly lit room for human

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up portrait of Character A facing the camera. Character A is a humanoid robot with a glossy white casing and blue eyes. The background is a plain, out-of-focus grey wall. Soft, even lighting highlights the reflective robotic shell. The framing is tight on her head and shoulders, with a neutral expression.

A medium close-up of Character B sitting indoors, looking at the camera. Character B is a young man wearing a blue denim shirt. The background is a softly lit room with a blurred wooden shelf. Natural indoor lighting illuminates his face evenly. He has an attentive and relaxed expression.

scenes.visual_description: The scene mimics a mobile video call interface. It alternates between Character A and Character B in the main view and the picture-in-picture inset. At the screenshot moment, Character A occupies the main screen. Video call control icons are overlaid at the bottom. Dynamic text captions appear in the center, highlighting grammatical corrections in red and green.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Hello, what is your name? [Hello, what is your name?]

Character B says: My name is Rahul. [My name is Rahul.]

Character A says: How old are you? [How old are you?]

Character B says: I have 22. [I have 22.]

Character A says: I have 22 नहीं, I am 22 years old होता है। [Not I have 22, it is I am 22 years old.]

Character B says: Okay okay, I am 22 years old. [Okay okay, I am 22 years old.]

Character A says: Where are you from? [Where are you from?]

Character B says: I am Uttar Pradesh. [I am Uttar Pradesh.]

Character A says: I am Uttar Pradesh नहीं, I am from Uttar Pradesh होगा। [Not I am Uttar Pradesh, it will be I am from Uttar Pradesh.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
HELLO WHAT IS YOUR NAME?
MY NAME IS RAHUL
HOW OLD ARE YOU?
I have 22
I have 22 नहीं (nahi)
I am 22 yrs old होता है (hota hai)
OKAY OKAY I AM 22 YEARS OLD
WHERE ARE YOU FROM?
I am Uttar Pradesh
I am Uttar Pradesh नहीं (nahi)
I am from Uttar Pradesh होगा (hoga)

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up of Character B sitting indoors, looking at the camera. Character B is a young man in a blue denim shirt, gesturing slightly with his right hand. The background is a softly lit room with a blurred wooden shelf. Natural indoor lighting illuminates his face evenly. He has a slightly hesitant but engaged expression.

A close-up portrait of Character A facing the camera. Character A is a humanoid robot with a glossy white casing and blue eyes. The background is a plain, out-of-focus grey wall. Soft, even lighting highlights the reflective robotic shell. The framing is tight on her head and shoulders.

scenes.visual_description: The video call layout alternates rapidly between Character B and Character A in the main background screen. At the screenshot moment, Character B is in the main screen with Character A in the inset. Video call control icons remain at the bottom. Large, dynamic text captions appear across the center. A large '7X CHEAPER' graphic pops up at the end.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: ओहो ठीक है ठीक है, मुझे इंग्लिश अच्छे से नहीं आती। [Oh okay okay, I don't know English well.]

Character A says: कोई प्रॉब्लम नहीं, AI teachers ट्राई किया? [No problem, have you tried AI teachers?]

Character B says: वो तो महंगे होते होंगे ना? [They must be expensive, right?]

Character A says: बिल्कुल नहीं, नार्मल इंग्लिश क्लासेस से 7 गुना सस्ता है। [Not at all, it is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
OH THEEK HAI THEEK HAI
MUJHE ENGLISH ACCHE SE NAHI AATI
KOI PROBLEM NAHI
AI TEACHERS TRY KIYA?
WO TOH MEHENGE HOTE HONGE NA?
BILKUL NAHI
NORMAL ENGLISH CLASSES SE
7X CHEAPER

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up portrait of Character A facing the camera. Character A is a humanoid robot with a glossy white casing and blue eyes. The background is a plain, out-of-focus grey wall. Soft, even lighting highlights the reflective robotic shell. The framing is tight on her head and shoulders, with a polite expression.

A medium close-up of Character B sitting indoors, looking at the camera. Character B is a young man wearing a blue denim shirt. The background is a softly lit room with a blurred wooden shelf. Natural indoor lighting illuminates his face evenly. He has an attentive expression.

scenes.visual_description: The layout shows Character A in the main screen and Character B in the inset. A large Google Play Store app installation overlay for 'MySivi' dominates the center. This overlay obscures most of Character A. The video call controls are still visible at the bottom. Dynamic captions continue to appear.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: इसलिए 50 लाख लोग MySivi पर इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस कर रहे हैं। [That's why 5 million people are practicing English on MySivi.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ISLIYE 50 LAKH LOG
MYSIVI PAR ENGLISH PRACTICE KAR RAHE HAIN
MySivi AI English Speaking...
Install
English Speaking App - Improve Your Spoken English and Fluency with AI Support

scenes.scene_label: Time Constraint and Call to Action
scenes.setting: Video call interface, plain grey background for AI, softly lit room for human

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up portrait of Character A facing the camera. Character A is a humanoid robot with a glossy white casing and blue eyes. The background is a plain, out-of-focus grey wall. Soft, even lighting highlights the reflective robotic shell. The framing is tight on her head and shoulders, featuring a slight smile.

A medium close-up of Character B sitting indoors, looking at the camera. Character B is a young man wearing a blue denim shirt. The background is a softly lit room with a blurred wooden shelf. Natural indoor lighting illuminates his face evenly. He has an eager and interested expression.

scenes.visual_description: The scene continues with Character A in the main screen and Character B in the inset. The app store overlay is no longer visible. Dynamic text captions appear in the center as Character A explains the app's benefits. The video call control icons remain at the bottom. The layout remains static for this segment.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: पर टाइम नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.]

Character A says: रोज़ की सिर्फ 15-20 मिनट की प्रैक्टिस काफी है। बिल्कुल कॉन्फिडेंट हो जाओगी। [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.]

Character B says: वाओ, कैसे ज्वाइन करूँ? [Wow, how do I join?]

Character A says: ये इनस्टॉल का बटन दबाओ और MySivi ऐप इनस्टॉल करो। सिर्फ 15 दिनों में तुम्हें इम्प्रूवमेंट दिखने लगेगी। चलो, शुरू हो जाओ। [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Come on, get started.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
PAR TIME NAHI MILTA
ROZ KI SIRF 15-20 MINUTE KI PRACTICE KAAFI HAI
BILKUL CONFIDENT HO JAOGI
WOW KAISE JOIN KARU?
YE INSTALL KA BUTTON DABAO
AUR MYSIVI APP INSTALL KARO
SIRF 15 DINO MEIN TUMHE IMPROVEMENT DIKHNE LAGEGI
CHALO SHURU HO JAO

panels.panel_visual_description: A sleek, modern smartphone is displayed in a three-quarter profile view. The phone features a prominent, multi-lens camera module and a metallic side frame. It is positioned against a solid, light purple background. Bright, studio-like lighting creates soft reflections on the device's surfaces. The minimalist composition focuses entirely on the hardware design.

scenes.visual_description: The video call interface disappears entirely. It is replaced by a solid light purple background. A 3D render of a smartphone slides into view. The MySivi app logo and an 'Install Now' button are displayed prominently next to the phone. This serves as the final call-to-action end card.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: इनस्टॉल नाउ पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
MySivi
English speaking app
Install Now
